extension.description: Invoke AI to generate the most appropriate Commit Message.
command.generate.title: AI Generate
view.candidates.name: Commit Candidates
config.title: Comitron
config.selectedTool.title: AI Tool
config.selectedTool.description: Automatically detects ClaudeCode, Codex, and Gemini CLI. Codex is preferred by default. If none are found, Custom is selected.
config.selectedTool.markdownDescription:
Automatically detects the following tools:

`ClaudeCode`
`Codex`
`Gemini CLI`

`Codex` is preferred by default. If none are found, `Custom` is selected.
config.detectedTools.title: Detected Tools
config.detectedTools.description: Shows the tools and paths currently detected on this machine. This field is for reference only.
config.detectedTools.markdownDescription: Shows the tools and paths currently detected on this machine. This field is for reference only.
config.toolPath.title: Tool Path
config.toolPath.description: The path is auto-filled for detected tools. It is cleared when Custom is selected. See the example below.
config.toolPath.markdownDescription:
The path is auto-filled for detected tools. It is cleared when `Custom` is selected.

Example value: `D:\nodejs\node_global\codex`
config.apiServiceJson.title: API Service JSON
config.apiServiceJson.description: Only takes effect when API Service is selected. The required keys are API URL, API Key, Model ID, and Custom Parameters.
config.apiServiceJson.markdownDescriptio:
Only takes effect when `API Service` is selected.

Required keys:
`API URL`
`API Key`
`Model ID`
`Custom Parameters`

`Custom Parameters` is used for extra parameters such as temperature.
config.promptTemplate.title: Prompt
config.promptTemplate.description: The main prompt. You can edit it directly. Keep the variables unchanged. Variable details are listed below.
Prompt When Commit Description Is Enabled
Used when Commit Description is enabled. Replaces {{extendedDescriptionInstruction}}.
Used when `Commit Description` is enabled. Replaces `{{extendedDescriptionInstruction}}`.
config.extendedDescriptionDisabledPrompt: Prompt When Commit Description Is Disabled
Used when Commit Description is disabled. Replaces {{extendedDescriptionInstruction}}.
Used when `Commit Description` is disabled. Replaces `{{extendedDescriptionInstruction}}`.
config.toolResponsePromptTemplate.title: Tool Response Prompt
config.toolResponsePromptTemplate.descri: The extra prompt used by all AI tools. It is recommended to keep the requirement that only JSON should be returned.
config.toolResponsePromptTemplate.markdo: The extra prompt used by all AI tools. It is recommended to keep the requirement that only JSON should be returned.
config.commitLanguage.title: Commit Language
config.commitLanguage.description: The language used to generate the commit message. Example values: Simplified Chinese, English
config.commitLanguage.markdownDescriptio:
The language used to generate the commit message.

Example values: `Simplified Chinese`, `English`
config.contextBudget.title: Context Budget
config.contextBudget.description: Controls the maximum diff context length sent to the AI. The extension will get as close as possible to this value without exceeding it, and it only keeps complete file diffs.
config.contextBudget.markdownDescription:
Controls the maximum diff context length sent to the AI.

The extension will get as close as possible to this value without exceeding it, and it only keeps complete file diffs without truncating a single file diff.
config.includeExtendedDescription.title: Commit Description
config.includeExtendedDescription.descri: Controls whether a commit description is generated.
config.includeExtendedDescription.markdo: Controls whether a `Commit Description` is generated.
config.uiLanguage.title: UI Language
config.uiLanguage.description: The UI language list of this extension. The default value is Simplified Chinese.
config.uiLanguage.markdownDescription:
The UI language list of this extension.

Default value: `Simplified Chinese`.
